inputs.label: Bolt Diameter
inputs.businessContext: ISO 898-1: Mechanical properties of fasteners. Bolt diameter is a primary factor in torque calculation.

inputs.label: Thread Pitch
inputs.businessContext: ISO 68-1: Basic profile of metric screw threads. Affects torque-tension relationship.

inputs.label: Friction Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: VDI 2230: Systematic calculation of high duty bolted joints. Typical values: 0.10-0.20 for lubricated, 0.15-0.30 for dry.

inputs.label: Preload Force
inputs.businessContext: Target clamping force required for joint integrity. Based on joint design and service loads.

inputs.label: Nut Factor (K)
inputs.businessContext: Empirical factor combining thread and underhead friction. Typical K=0.2 for as-received condition per SAE J1701.

inputs.label: Torque Method
inputs.businessContext: ISO 16047: Tightening torque test methods. Torque control is most common; torque-angle provides higher accuracy.

inputs.label: Lubrication Condition
inputs.businessContext: Affects friction coefficient. Per VDI 2230: dry (0.15-0.30), oiled (0.10-0.20), coated (0.05-0.12).

rules: if torqueMethod == 'torqueAngle' then preloadForce must be specified

thresholds.frictionCoefficient > 0.3: High friction may cause under-tightening; consider lubrication.
thresholds.nutFactor > 0.3: Nut factor high; verify lubrication and surface condition.
thresholds.preloadForce > 500000: Very high preload; verify bolt grade and joint capacity.

formulas.torqueAngle: if torqueMethod == 'torqueAngle' then (preloadForce * threadPitch) / (2 * Math.PI * frictionCoefficient) else null

breakdown.torqueAngle: if torqueMethod == 'torqueAngle' then (preloadForce * threadPitch) / (2 * Math.PI * frictionCoefficient) else null

suggestedActions: If friction coefficient > 0.3, consider using lubricant to reduce scatter.
If nut factor > 0.3, verify bolt and nut surface finish.
If preload force > 500000 N, check bolt grade (e.g., 12.9) and joint design.

premiumFeatures: PDF export of torque calculation report
CSV export of historical torque data
Trend analysis of torque vs. preload over time
Detailed report with joint diagrams and material specs
